Telemetry.__comment: story-selection/04 (anonymous serve log). StorageConnectionString is supplied PER-ENVIRONMENT (Key Vault / an App Service app setting / an env var - never committed here). When it is empty or absent the API uses the NoOp sink and runs with zero Azure setup (AC-05); when it is present the API writes anonymous, PII-free 'template served' events to Azure Table Storage. NO secret ever lives in this file.

Ai.__comment: ai-cost-gate/01 (server-side AI proxy). Endpoint + Deployment are NON-secret and select the Foundry-backed client when Endpoint is present; empty/absent => the API uses the no-op AI client and runs with zero AI setup (AC-04). ApiKey is a SECRET and is NEVER committed here - supply it from user-secrets / env / a Key Vault-backed app setting only, and NEVER a VITE_* var (AC-03). Preferred auth is the App Service managed identity (no key). InputCostPerMillion / OutputCostPerMillion sit beside Deployment so a model swap (gpt-4o-mini -> gpt-4.1-nano, ADR 0001) is a one-place change; story 04's spend estimator reads them.
